author: user-chris
body: Updated the supply request threshold — linen stock below 20 units now triggers automatic restocking request.

author: user-hk-super
body: Good update. Added note about microfiber cloth separate from linen count.

author: user-chris
body: Can we add a section on what to do when the tablet goes offline mid-shift? Floor 14 ran into this last month.

author: user-it1
body: Added expedited replacement process for supervisors — badge ready same day if requested before noon.
